midjourney.reason: Midjourney has no free tier and no API

github-copilot.reason: Copilot is $10/mo with no free tier for most users

openai-gpt4o.reason: GPT-4 API is expensive at scale

elevenlabs.reason: ElevenLabs free tier is limited to 10K chars/mo

dalle3.reason: DALL-E 3 API is paid per image

runway-ml.reason: Runway credits run out fast on free tier

notion-ai.reason: Notion AI requires a paid add-on

openai-embeddings.reason: OpenAI embeddings are pay-per-token with no free tier

pinecone.reason: Pinecone free tier is limited to 100K vectors
